mapper.sql: id , user_id, transaction_number, coinId, actual_amount, amount, rate_amount, withdrawal_id, status, receiving_address,remark,withdrawal_hash, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted
mapper.insert: insert into t_withdraw_apply(id, user_id, transaction_number, coinId, actual_amount, amount, rate_amount, withdrawal_id, status, receiving_address, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{transactionNumber}, #{coinId}, #{actualAmount}, #{amount}, #{rateAmount}, #{withdrawalId}, #{status}, #{receivingAddress}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.select:
select
from t_withdraw_apply where withdrawal_id = #{withdrawalId} and is_deleted=0 limit 1

select
from t_withdraw_apply where transaction_number = #{transactionNumber} and is_deleted=0 limit 1
mapper.update:
update t_withdraw_apply
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
transaction_number = #{transactionNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
coinId = #{coinId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
actual_amount = #{actualAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
rate_amount = #{rateAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
withdrawal_id = #{withdrawalId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
receiving_address = #{receivingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
withdrawal_hash = #{withdrawalHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_deleted = 0
update t_withdraw_apply set status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_deleted = 0

update t_withdraw_apply set status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, withdrawal_id = #{withdrawalId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
select
from t_withdraw_apply where is_deleted = 0 and status = #{status} order by create_time asc

select
from t_withdraw_apply where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select count(1) from t_withdraw_apply where is_deleted = 0 and user_id= #{userId} order by create_time desc

select count(1) from t_withdraw_apply where is_deleted = 0 and status in
#{status}
